widget.name: Ruston Notify
widget.description: Persistent task pop-up inside Kommo: stays on screen until you close it, reappears when you navigate, with sound and browser notification. Alerts you about due or overdue tasks.

settings.position: Pop-up position: bottom-right, bottom-left, top-right or top-left (default bottom-right)
settings.sound: Play sound on alert? Y or N (default Y)
settings.lookahead_min: Alert tasks due within the next X minutes (default 15; overdue always alert)

dp.message: Alert message (used only if you enable the Digital Pipeline + webhook trigger)
